The Lore

The Chad Wizard did not stumble into power.
He studied the charts like grimoires.
He waited through red skies and weak hands.
And when the moment came, he bought the dip so hard
the candles turned green on instinct.

Now he walks among us.

Staff charged.

Mana compounding.

Contingency already woven into tomorrow.

He does not chase pumps. He engineers inevitability.

He does not beg for consensus. He bends probability.

He needs nothing.

And if you understand the meta, you already know why you might need him.
